# Tutorial: powerplatform-environment editor

> CSA Loom `powerplatform-environment` editor — confirmed working against the live console on 2026-05-26.

## Open the editor

1. Sign in to **CSA Loom Console** at https://loom-console-fvbbctd4eehqbkcs.b02.azurefd.net.
2. Open or create a workspace from the **Workspaces** page.
3. Click **+ New item** and choose **powerplatform environment** from the catalog.
4. The editor opens at `/items/powerplatform-environment/<id>`:

![powerplatform-environment editor](./img/editor-powerplatform-environment.png)

## What this editor does

The powerplatform-environment editor is one of the 59 A-grade editors that load cleanly against real Azure backends in the Loom v3.18 release. See the [Learn drawer](../../apps/fiab-console/lib/learn/content.ts) inside the editor for the full description, steps, and Microsoft Learn links.
